category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Guetzli as a perceptual JPEG encoder; official GitHub README describes it as a JPEG encoder for high visual quality compression.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is guetzli; official GitHub repository title is google/guetzli.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for building and using the encoder.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/google/guetzli, so repo enrichment is intentionally not repeated.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists guetzli; source_facts.description and official README identify JPEG encoder functionality.
